name: Pasta with Asparagus and Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 4 tbsp Cooking oil; best olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until it is half crispy. Set aside and drain the fat from the pan.
2. Add the heavy cream to the pan and cook over medium-high heat until it reduces by half.
3. Remove the pan from the heat and add the cooked bacon back into the pan.
4. In a separate frying pan, heat enough oil to cover the surface. Once hot, add the shrimp shells and cook until the shells turn pink and the shrimp begin to lose their transparency. Flip once and remove the shrimp to cool on a plate. Remove the shells from the shrimp and place them back in the pan.
5. Add the white wine and cook over low heat, simmering until only 1/4 cup of liquid remains.
6. Stir in the heavy cream and set aside.
7. Peel the asparagus and cut into half-inch pieces. Steam or blanch until tender, then drain and rinse with cold water before drying with a towel.
8. In a large pot, bring water to boil and add salt and oil. Cook the pasta until done or to your desired doneness. Drain and toss lightly with butter.
9. Reheat the cream with the shrimp, then add the asparagus. Season to taste.
10. Combine the pasta and sauce together. Sprinkle with fresh chives and serve with warm crusty bread.
